description: Reference workflow that keeps divedra orchestration on claude-code while delegating concrete coding work to codex, authored as a linear ordered node list.

prompts.divedraPromptTemplate: Coordinate {{workflowId}} so claude-code managers preserve scope, keep instructions concrete, and hand coding tasks to codex only when the implementation brief is ready. When `divedra gql` is available, use it for manager control actions such as retries and manager-authored routing instead of relying only on prose.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Work only on the current node's responsibility. Return a concise business JSON payload that is useful to the next node.
